name: Banana Range Wind Farm
operational_notes: EDF is CIS counterparty (SPV 'Orange Creek Energy Pty Ltd' operating entity — acquired by EDF from Lacour Energy May 2021). Project microsite is bananarangewindfarm.com.au. EDF's second T7 win (with Whyte Yarcowie SA). Banana Shire Council indicated construction 'expected to start in 2026' — nothing publicly confirmed yet.

timeline.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (228 MW)
timeline.detail: Wind-only — 228 MW awarded under CIS T7. EDF's first of two T7 wins.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)
Australia's biggest wind project and 8 battery hybrids among 19 winners (RenewEconomy)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: EDF is CIS counterparty via 'Orange Creek Energy Pty Ltd' SPV (acquired from Lacour Energy May 2021). Banana Shire Council indicated construction 'expected to start in 2026' — no formal FID.
